meaning: n.心境恶劣,心情恶劣,精神抑郁(症)
examples: The symptoms of dysthymia last for a long time-two years or more.
These traits may actually be caused by low-level depression (called dysthymia).
Dysthymia symptoms usually come and go over a period of years, and their intensity can change over time.
Eeyore has chronic dysthymia (mild depression) and could benefit greatly from an antidepressant.
